case_title: HAMBURGER PROPERTIES VS MOYLAND DANIEL P DBA DPM INC

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOYLAND DANIEL P  DBA DPM INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HAMBURGER PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT MOYLAND DANIEL P  DBA DPM INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMBURGER PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOYLAND DANIEL P  DBA DPM INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
